b. space fraction numerator log open parentheses 1000 close parentheses over denominator scriptbase log open parentheses 25 close parentheses plus scriptbase log open parentheses 3 close parentheses end scriptbase presubscript blank presuperscript 3 end scriptbase presubscript blank presuperscript 5 end fraction equals....
